Thrown when the request is authenticated but not authorized to access the target resource.

Blob
Provider-neutral representation of a blob/object and its associated metadata.
Blob.Builder
 
BlobNotFoundException
Thrown when the requested blob/object does not exist.
BlobStorageAsyncClient
Asynchronous provider-neutral client for bucket and blob operations.
BlobStorageClientFactory
Factory for adapting provider SDK clients to the UBSA sync or async interfaces.
BlobStorageSyncClient
Synchronous provider-neutral client for bucket and blob operations.
BlobWriteOptions
Optional metadata and content settings applied when creating or uploading a blob using streaming.
BlobWriteOptions.Builder
 
Bucket
Provider-neutral representation of bucket/container metadata.
Bucket.Builder
Builder for Bucket.
BucketAlreadyExistsException
Thrown when creating a bucket/container that already exists.

BucketNotFoundException
Thrown when the requested bucket/container does not exist.

Thrown when a conditional request fails.

Thrown when the request is malformed or contains invalid parameters for the target provider.
ListingPage<T>
A single page of listing results returned by a paginated UBSA operation.
PagedFlowPublisher<T>
 
PagedIterable<T>
Lazily iterates across all items produced by a paginated listing function.
PageRequest
Parameters for requesting a single page from a paginated UBSA listing operation.

Thrown when the provider times out while processing the request.
